steps.t: Dinodas and the other Boffins agreed to meet you outside Angelica's new home in Nobottle, on Honeymead Lane.
Dinodas stands outside Angelica's new home on Honeymead Lane, very pleased with himself.
Prisca Boffin and many of her children gather on Honeymead Lane to welcome Angelica to her new home.
Bingo Boffin stands on Honeymead Lane with his cousin Prisca and some of her children.
Angelica Boffin is delighted to see that you and so much of her family has come to Nobottle to welcome her to her new home.
Dinodas stands alone outside 9 Honeymead Lane.
